# mikaio.dev

> Free, fast, private browser tools in 10 languages. No signup, no data leaves your device.

## Tools
- [Age Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/agecalc/): Free age calculator. Enter your date of birth to see your exact age in years, months and days, your total days lived, and a countdown to your next birthday.
- [List Alphabetizer](https://mikaio.dev/en/alphabetizer/): Free online list alphabetizer. Sort any list A-Z, Z-A, by last word, or remove duplicates instantly. Paste your list and click sort.
- [Area Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/areacalc/): Free area calculator. Calculate the area of rectangles, circles, triangles, squares, and trapezoids. Enter dimensions and get the area instantly in your browser.
- [Aspect Ratio Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/aspectratio/): Free aspect ratio calculator. Enter width and height to get the simplified ratio (e.g. 1920×1080 = 16:9) and scale to any new size instantly.
- [Backwards Text Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/backwardstext/): Free backwards text generator. Instantly reverse the letters, the word order or the line order of any text in your browser, then copy the result.
- [Base64 Encoder / Decoder](https://mikaio.dev/en/base64codec/): Free Base64 encoder and decoder. Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 strings back to plain text instantly in your browser.
- [Online Basic Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/basiccalc/): Free online calculator. Perform addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division. A clean, simple, full-featured basic calculator that works entirely in your browser.
- [Binary Translator](https://mikaio.dev/en/binarytext/): Free binary translator. Convert any text to binary code and decode binary back to text, with full Unicode support, instantly and privately in your browser.
- [Number Base Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/bintodec/): Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal instantly. Free online base converter with instant results.
- [Blood Type Compatibility Checker](https://mikaio.dev/en/bloodtype/): Free blood type compatibility checker. Select your ABO/Rh blood type to instantly see who you can donate blood to and who you can receive blood from.
- [BMI Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/bmicalc/): Free BMI calculator. Enter your height and weight in metric or imperial units to get your Body Mass Index and category instantly, in your browser.
- [BMR Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/bmrcalc/): Free BMR calculator. Calculate your Basal Metabolic Rate — the calories your body burns at rest per day. Uses the Mifflin-St Jeor equation.
- [50/30/20 Budget Rule Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/budget503020/): Free 50/30/20 budget rule calculator. Enter your monthly income to instantly see how much to allocate to needs, wants, and savings.
- [Food Calorie Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/caloriecalc/): Free calorie calculator. Look up approximate calories per 100g for common foods. Great for diet tracking and meal planning.
- [Case Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/caseconverter/): Free online case converter. Instantly change text to UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, aLtErNaTiNg case and small caps in your browser.
- [Character Counter](https://mikaio.dev/en/charcount/): Free character counter. Count characters (with and without spaces), words, sentences, paragraphs, and lines in any text. Instant, no signup needed.
- [Coin Flip](https://mikaio.dev/en/cointoss/): Free online coin flip. Tap to flip a fair virtual coin and get heads or tails instantly, with a running tally. Works in your browser, no app needed.
- [Color Picker](https://mikaio.dev/en/colorpicker/): Free color picker. Select any color and instantly get its HEX, RGB, and HSL codes. Copy with one click. Works entirely in your browser.
- [Compound Interest Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/compoundinterest/): Free compound interest calculator. Enter a principal, interest rate, and time period to see how compound interest grows your investment. Monthly, quarterly, or annual compounding.
- [Countdown Timer](https://mikaio.dev/en/countdown/): Free countdown timer. Enter any future date and see exactly how many days, hours, minutes and seconds remain. Works in your browser, no signup needed.
- [Currency Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/currencyconverter/): Free currency converter with approximate exchange rates. Convert USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, BRL, and 30+ more currencies instantly in your browser.
- [Day of the Week](https://mikaio.dev/en/dayofweek/): Free day of week calculator. Find out what day of the week any date falls on. Check birthdays, historical dates, or any future date instantly.
- [Days Between Dates](https://mikaio.dev/en/daysbetween/): Free days between dates calculator. Find exactly how many days, weeks, and months are between any two dates. Works instantly in your browser.
- [Discount Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/discountcalc/): Free discount calculator. Enter the original price and the discount percentage to instantly see the final sale price and exactly how much you save.
- [Electricity Cost Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/electricitycost/): Free electricity cost calculator. Enter an appliance wattage, hours of use per day, and your electricity rate to see daily, monthly, and annual running costs.
- [Fraction Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/fractioncalc/): Free fraction calculator. Add, subtract, multiply or divide any two fractions and get the simplified result instantly. Also shows the decimal equivalent.
- [GCD Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/gcdcalc/): Free GCD calculator. Find the Greatest Common Divisor (GCD/GCF/HCF) of any set of numbers. Also shows the LCM. Instant results in your browser.
- [CSS Gradient Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/gradientgen/): Free CSS gradient generator. Create linear and radial gradients with any colors and instantly get the CSS code. No signup needed.
- [Hash Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/hashgenerator/): Free hash generator. Calculate SHA-256, SHA-1, and MD5 hashes for any text input instantly in your browser. No data is sent anywhere.
- [Ideal Weight Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/idealweightcalc/): Free ideal weight calculator. Find the healthy weight range for your height and sex using the BMI method and the Robinson, Miller, and Devine formulas.
- [JSON Formatter & Validator](https://mikaio.dev/en/jsonformatter/): Free JSON formatter and validator. Paste JSON to format it with proper indentation, minify it, or check it for errors. Works in your browser instantly.
- [LCM Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/lcmcalc/): Free LCM calculator. Find the Least Common Multiple (LCM) of any set of numbers. Also shows the GCD. Instant results in your browser.
- [Leap Year Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/leapyear/): Free leap year calculator. Check if any year is a leap year and find the next leap year. Instant results in your browser.
- [Loan Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/loancalc/): Free loan calculator. Enter the loan amount, interest rate, and term to see your monthly payment and total interest paid. Works for mortgages, car loans, and personal loans.
- [Lorem Ipsum Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/loremipsum/): Free Lorem Ipsum generator. Create placeholder dummy text by paragraphs, sentences or words for design mockups and layouts, then copy it in one click.
- [Magic 8 Ball](https://mikaio.dev/en/magic8ball/): Free online Magic 8 Ball. Think of a yes-or-no question, tap the ball, and receive one of the classic fortune-telling answers. Fun, instant and private.
- [Morse Code Translator](https://mikaio.dev/en/morsetranslator/): Free Morse code translator. Convert any text to Morse code dots and dashes, or decode Morse code back to text. Includes audio playback. Works entirely in your browser.
- [Octal Number Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/octalconverter/): Free octal converter tool. Instantly convert any number between base 2 (binary), base 8 (octal), base 10 (decimal), and base 16 (hex).
- [Paint Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/paintcalc/): Free paint calculator. Enter your wall dimensions, number of coats, and paint coverage to calculate exactly how many litres of paint you need.
- [Palindrome Checker](https://mikaio.dev/en/palindromocheck/): Free palindrome checker. Instantly test whether a word, phrase or number reads the same forwards and backwards, ignoring case, spaces and punctuation.
- [Percentage Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/percentage/): Free percentage calculator. Find a percent of a number, work out what percent one value is of another, and calculate percentage increase or decrease instantly.
- [Pomodoro Timer](https://mikaio.dev/en/pomodoro/): Free Pomodoro timer. 25-minute focus sessions with 5-minute short breaks and 15-minute long breaks. No signup needed. Runs in your browser with sound alerts.
- [Prime Number Checker](https://mikaio.dev/en/primechecker/): Free prime number checker. Enter any positive integer to instantly find out if it is prime. Also shows all divisors and the prime factorization.
- [Pythagorean Theorem Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/pythagorean/): Free Pythagorean theorem calculator. Enter any two sides of a right triangle to find the third. Works for hypotenuse or either leg. Instant and accurate.
- [QR Code Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/qrmaker/): Free QR code generator. Create a QR code for any URL, text, WiFi password, or contact information. Download as PNG. Works entirely in your browser.
- [Random Color Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/randomcolor/): Free random color generator. Generate a random colour and see its HEX, RGB and HSL codes instantly. Great for design inspiration and picking palettes.
- [Random Letter Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/randomletter/): Free random letter generator. Pick one or many random letters from A to Z, in uppercase, lowercase or mixed case, instantly and fairly in your browser.
- [Random Name Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/randomname/): Free random name generator. Generate random first and last names by gender and cultural origin. Perfect for writers, game developers, and baby name inspiration.
- [Random Number Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/randomnumber/): Free random number generator. Pick one or many random numbers between any minimum and maximum, with an option for unique results. Secure and instant in your browser.
- [Random Quote Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/randomquote/): Free random quote generator. Get a new inspirational or motivational quote with every click. Hundreds of famous quotes from history's greatest thinkers.
- [Reading Time Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/readingtime/): Free reading time calculator. Paste any text to instantly see the word count, estimated reading time, and estimated speaking time. No signup needed.
- [Retirement Savings Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/retirementcalc/): Free retirement calculator. Estimate your retirement savings based on monthly contributions, expected return, and years to retirement.
- [Rock Paper Scissors](https://mikaio.dev/en/rockpaperscissors/): Free online Rock Paper Scissors game. Play against the computer, see results instantly, and track your score. No download or signup needed.
- [Dice Roller](https://mikaio.dev/en/rolldice/): Free online dice roller. Roll d4, d6, d8, d10, d12, d20, and d100 dice, alone or in groups. Perfect for D&D, tabletop RPGs, and board games. No download needed.
- [Roman Numeral Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/romanmath/): Free Roman numeral converter. Convert any number from 1 to 3999 to Roman numerals, or convert Roman numerals back to decimal. Instant and accurate.
- [Rounding Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/roundingcalc/): Free rounding calculator. Round any number to a chosen number of decimal places, or round up or down, instantly and precisely in your browser.
- [Sales Tax Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/salestax/): Free sales tax calculator. Enter a price and a tax rate to add tax to a net price or extract it from a gross price. Works for VAT, GST, and any percentage.
- [Speed Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/speedconverter/): Free speed converter. Convert between metres per second, kilometres per hour, miles per hour, knots, and Mach number instantly.
- [Square Root Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/squarecalc/): Free square root calculator. Find the square root of any positive number instantly. Also shows the square (n²). Works in your browser with no signup required.
- [Stopwatch](https://mikaio.dev/en/stopwatch/): Free online stopwatch with millisecond precision. Start, pause, record lap times, and reset. No download needed. Works entirely in your browser.
- [Syllable Counter](https://mikaio.dev/en/syllablecount/): Free syllable counter. Count the number of syllables in any English word or text instantly. Useful for poetry, song lyrics, and haiku writing.
- [Temperature Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/tempconverter/): Free temperature converter. Convert temperatures between Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin, and Rankine instantly. See all four scales at once.
- [Text Diff Tool](https://mikaio.dev/en/textdiff/): Free text diff tool. Compare two texts and highlight the differences between them. Find added, removed, and changed words instantly.
- [Text Repeater](https://mikaio.dev/en/textrepeater/): Free text repeater. Repeat a word, phrase or line as many times as you like, with a line break, space or comma between copies, then copy the result instantly.
- [TikTok Caption Analyzer](https://mikaio.dev/en/tiktokcharcount/): Free TikTok caption analyzer. See character count vs 2200 limit, hashtag count, word count, and estimated read time. Optimize your TikTok captions instantly.
- [Time Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/timecalc/): Free time calculator. Add or subtract hours, minutes, and seconds easily. Great for calculating total work hours, travel times, and durations.
- [Time Zone Difference Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/timezonediff/): Free time zone difference calculator. Find the exact hour difference between any two cities or time zones worldwide. Instant results in your browser.
- [Tip Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/tipcalc/): Free tip calculator. Enter the bill and tip percentage to see the tip amount and total, then split it evenly between any number of people. Instant and private.
- [Twitter / X Character Counter](https://mikaio.dev/en/tweetcount/): Free Twitter/X character counter. Counts tweet length with URL normalisation (each URL = 23 chars). Color-coded limit indicator for the 280-character limit.
- [Unit Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/unitconverter/): Free unit converter. Convert between meters and feet, kilograms and pounds, Celsius and Fahrenheit, liters and gallons, and many more units instantly in your browser.
- [Unix Timestamp Converter](https://mikaio.dev/en/unixepoch/): Free Unix timestamp converter. Convert Unix epoch time to a human-readable date and time, or convert any date back to a Unix timestamp. Works instantly in your browser.
- [Upside Down Text Generator](https://mikaio.dev/en/upsidedowntext/): Free upside down text generator. Flip any text into upside-down characters you can copy and paste into social media, bios and messages. Instant and private.
- [UTM Link Builder](https://mikaio.dev/en/utmbuilder/): Free UTM builder. Create UTM-tagged URLs for Google Analytics and other analytics platforms. Track traffic from email, social media, and paid campaigns.
- [Daily Water Intake Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/waterintake/): Free water intake calculator. Find out exactly how much water you should drink each day based on your body weight and activity level. Instant results in your browser.
- [Week Number](https://mikaio.dev/en/weeknumber/): Free week number calculator. Find the ISO week number for any date. See what week of the year it is today or for any date you choose.
- [Word Counter](https://mikaio.dev/en/wordcount/): Free live word counter. Paste or type text to count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs and estimated reading time instantly in your browser.
- [Work Days Calculator](https://mikaio.dev/en/workdays/): Free work days calculator. Count the number of business days (Monday–Friday) between any two dates, excluding weekends. Instant results in your browser.
- [World Clock](https://mikaio.dev/en/worldclock/): Free world clock. Compare the current local time in multiple cities simultaneously. No signup required. Updates every second in your browser.
- [Yes or No](https://mikaio.dev/en/yesorno/): Free Yes or No generator. Ask a question and get a fair, random yes or no answer instantly, with a running tally. Works in your browser, no app needed.

## Index
- [Glossary of all tools](https://mikaio.dev/glossary.html)
